# Mitryxa

## About
Mitryxa Labs LLC (pronounced MIT-rick-suh) is a technology company based in Los Angeles, California that builds AI-powered decision platforms for professional service businesses. The company designs interactive client acquisition systems that qualify leads, educate prospects, and guide decisions through intelligent question flows.

## Tagline
AI Decision Platforms

## Website
https://mitryxa.com

## Pages
- Home: https://mitryxa.com/
- AI Platforms: https://mitryxa.com/ai-platforms
- Use Cases: https://mitryxa.com/use-cases
- Technology: https://mitryxa.com/technology
- Insights: https://mitryxa.com/insights
- About: https://mitryxa.com/about
- Contact: https://mitryxa.com/contact
- Privacy Policy: https://mitryxa.com/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://mitryxa.com/terms

## Platform Offerings
- Legal Case Navigator: AI-guided legal case assessment and lead qualification
- Medical Health Navigator: Patient routing and medical consultation preparation
- Real Estate HomePath: Interactive home buying decision platform
- Wealth Strategy Navigator: Financial goal analysis and strategy recommendation
- Mortgage Decision Platform: Mortgage comparison and borrower qualification
- Cosmetic Consultation Navigator: Procedure exploration and provider matching
- Home Health Care Assessment: Care needs evaluation and provider matching
- GlobalFlow Payment Platform: Multi-rail payment processing and stablecoin settlement
- Aurelia Fine Jewels: Interactive ring builder and bespoke consultation flow
- Welding Service Navigator: AI-guided welding and fabrication service lead qualification
- Blackwing Mortgage Platform: AI-powered mortgage tools with rate comparison and borrower qualification
- Kaprielle Luxury Skincare: Ritual-crafted organic skincare e-commerce with entrepreneur program
- EricFilm Cinematography: Celebrity wedding films and high-end event cinematography

- Interactive Lead Qualification Platforms
- Decision Calculators
- Educational Client Platforms
- Lead Intelligence Reports
